_publications._publicationTitle: Evaluation of quality of life in adults with neurofibromatosis 1 (NF1) using the Impact of NF1 on Quality Of Life (INF1-QOL) questionnaire.

_contextSnippet: The mean inter-relater reliability for the grading of clinical severity scores was 0.71 (range 0.65-0.79), and the intra-class correlation was 0.92.
